summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dwianto Capital Advisory - iteration 2. All new features tested and working: flag-based language switcher, multilingual blog content from backend API, language-based URL routing, and deep charcoal navbar (#2A2A2A).

issues: Hydration warning in console: <span> inside <option> element in service interest dropdown - minor React warning, not user-facing

critical_code_review_comments: BlogDetail.js line 18: useEffect missing 'fetchBlog' dependency - ESLint warning shown in frontend logs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded blog data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 2 fully tested and working. Navbar is deep charcoal #2A2A2A. Language switcher uses flag icons from flagcdn.com. Multilingual blog content served from backend with translations stored in MongoDB. URL routing works with language prefixes (/en, /ar, /zh, /es). Contact form submission working.

navbar_color_test.details: Navbar background color confirmed as rgb(42, 42, 42) = #2A2A2A (deep charcoal). White/gold text visible.

language_switcher_flag_test.details: Language switcher button shows flag icon from flagcdn.com (not text abbreviation). UK flag for English, Saudi flag for Arabic, China flag for Chinese, Spain flag for Spanish.

language_dropdown_test.details: Dropdown shows flag + language name for all 4 languages: English, العربية, 中文, Español

url_routing_test.details: Switching language updates URL to include language prefix. Tested: /ar, /en, /zh, /es

insights_page_translation_test.details: Insights page title and labels translate correctly. Arabic: رؤى الصناعة, Chinese: 行业见解

blog_cards_translation_test.details: Blog cards show translated titles/excerpts when language is switched. Verified Arabic and Chinese translations.

blog_detail_translation_test.details: Blog detail page shows translated content. Verified Chinese blog title '2025年印尼外国直接投资完全指南' and Chinese content.

direct_url_routing_test.details: Direct URL access /ar/insights loads Arabic Insights page correctly. Language is detected from URL.

navigation_links_test.details: Navigation links work with language prefix. Clicking About on /ar/ goes to /ar/about.

contact_form_test.details: POST /api/contact endpoint works. Form submission shows success message 'Thank You! We've received your inquiry and will respond within 24 hours.'

footer_links_test.details: Footer links include language prefix in URLs. Verified /es/about, /es/insights.

backend_api_tests.details: 11/11 backend tests passed: API root, GET /api/blogs (default, Arabic, Chinese, Spanish), GET /api/blogs/{slug} (English, Chinese), non-existent blog, POST /api/contact (success, optional fields, validation)
